title: NOAA National Weather Service Education
description: A NOAA source card for weather safety, forecasting, and National Weather Service learning materials.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: National Weather Service education resources support learning about forecasts, warnings, weather safety, observations, storms, and local weather offices.
Use this source for practical nonfiction connected to maps, local data, emergency communication, and community preparedness.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
